No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST's Motion To Compel is Denied as moot - summary judgment was granted.

MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Marc Cefalu, Esq. 415-438-4600 of Cox Wootton Lerner Griffin & Hansen LLP for Plaintiff.
No Other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested.The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And/Or Summary Adjudication Of Claims.

Grant. No opposition filed.

Order is Signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

RULING - ARGUED, PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST'S Motion To Deem Admitted Defendants Requests For Admission is unopposed and granted. order signed in open court. Proceedings not reported; Judge: David R. McDonald; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany (jpt/302).
